name: Damaris SA
summary: Damaris SA designs and publishes software packages for secured document sharing and storage. It engages in sale of licenses for physical storage and accounting document, sale of special peripherals, and consulting, installation, maintenance, and training services. The company's products are designed mainly for the banking, industry, transport, and healthcare fields, as well as the public sector. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Dardilly, France.
